# results/

This folder contains plots and metric summaries generated by the analysis scripts in `analysis/`.

## Note on the pre-generated files

The plots and CSV files currently present in this folder were produced by a **minimal integration test** — a short run on a small subset of images with a reduced vocabulary, intended only to verify that the pipeline executes end to end.  They are **not** representative of the full results reported in the paper.

To reproduce the paper's figures and metrics, users are kindly asked to run the complete suite of experiments as described in the main [README](../README.md).  This involves fine-tuning the vision models, training the aligners, building the concept vocabularies, and running all nine configurations of the explanation pipeline — a process that typically takes **about a week** on a GPU-equipped machine.  Once the experiment outputs are in place, all eight metrics can be reproduced quickly from the precomputed CSV files using the Jupyter notebook or the individual analysis scripts.

Thank you for your time and interest in this work.
